description: A blanket/framework order with a supplier for repeat or indirect buys (SCOR S1.3/OE6). It fixes agreed prices and terms and sets a total-value and/or total-quantity ceiling, against which requisitions RELEASE without re-sourcing. The repeat/preferred/framework branch of sourcing bypasses the competitive RFQ event when an active framework covers the item and the call-off is within the remaining ceiling. Each CallOffRelease draws down the ceiling; when the ceiling is exhausted or the validity ends, further demand must run a competitive event.

fields.name: frameworkAgreementId
fields.label: Framework Agreement No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for the blanket agreement so every call-off, the ceiling draw-down, and audit entries reference one framework; the handle the bypass branch resolves against.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: an ONBOARDED supplier (typically Grade A / preferred for the category); must not be SUSPENDED for a release to proceed
fields.purpose: The preferred supplier the framework is held with; the party every call-off PO is issued to without re-sourcing. Its AVL status gates whether releases may proceed (axiom A10/A11).

fields.name: validityStart
fields.label: Validity Start
fields.validation: <= validityEnd; the date releases may begin
fields.purpose: Opens the window in which call-offs may be released against the framework; a release before this date is not covered.

fields.name: validityEnd
fields.label: Validity End
fields.validation: >= validityStart; after this date the framework is EXPIRED and the bypass branch no longer applies
fields.purpose: Closes the window; once past, demand cannot call off against the framework and must run a competitive event instead.

fields.name: agreedPrices
fields.label: Agreed Prices
fields.validation: list of {itemId or description, uom, agreedUnitPrice, currency, paymentTerms, deliveryTerms, incoterm}; read-only on a call-off
fields.purpose: The fixed prices and terms a call-off inherits read-only (agreedPrice, paymentTerms, deliveryTerms, incoterm) so a release skips quotation and negotiation entirely.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; the ceiling and draw-downs are tracked in this currency, normalized to base for analytics
fields.purpose: The currency the agreed prices and value ceiling are denominated in; the basis the FX service normalizes for cross-currency ceiling reporting (axiom A12).

fields.name: totalValueCeiling
fields.label: Total Value Ceiling
fields.mandatoryCondition: at least one of totalValueCeiling or totalQuantityCeiling must be set
fields.validation: >= 0; the maximum cumulative value of all call-offs; remaining = ceiling - sum(release.value); a release exceeding remaining is blocked
fields.purpose: The spend cap on the framework; the value cumulatively drawn down by call-offs and the limit that, once reached, forces a competitive event for further demand.

fields.name: totalQuantityCeiling
fields.label: Total Quantity Ceiling
fields.mandatoryCondition: at least one of totalValueCeiling or totalQuantityCeiling must be set
fields.validation: >= 0; the maximum cumulative quantity of all call-offs; remaining = ceiling - sum(release.quantity); a release exceeding remaining is blocked
fields.purpose: The volume cap on the framework; the quantity cumulatively drawn down by call-offs, an alternative or complement to the value ceiling for volume-based frameworks.

fields.name: consumedValue
fields.label: Consumed Value
fields.validation: computed = sum of value of active call-offs; <= totalValueCeiling
fields.purpose: The running total drawn against the value ceiling so the remaining headroom is known at every release and the framework flips to EXHAUSTED when fully consumed.

fields.name: consumedQuantity
fields.label: Consumed Quantity
fields.validation: computed = sum of quantity of active call-offs; <= totalQuantityCeiling
fields.purpose: The running total drawn against the quantity ceiling so remaining volume is known at every release and over-draw is prevented.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: DRAFT -> ACTIVE (on approval) -> EXHAUSTED (ceiling reached) | EXPIRED (past validityEnd) | TERMINATED; only ACTIVE within validity and with remaining ceiling permits a release
fields.purpose: Tracks whether the framework can currently absorb a call-off; the bypass branch only fires when the framework is ACTIVE, within validity, and has remaining ceiling.

invariants: A6 framework setup/award reuses the approval engine with SoD
A10 a SUSPENDED supplier's framework cannot back new releases/POs without resolution
A12 the ceiling and draw-downs are normalized to base for analytics
A13 setup, each draw-down, and status changes are audited and broadcast
cumulative call-off draw-down can never exceed the value/quantity ceiling (sourcing rule)
a release is permitted only when the framework is ACTIVE and within validity
